focus: Recurring local recommendations, events, outings, experiences, and city-exploration loops.

agent_submissions.notes: Pilot agent 1 for Local Discovery / Experiences. Focus on repeated domain loops, not generic tooling.

agent_brief.focus: Recurring local recommendations, events, outings, experiences, and city-exploration loops.
agent_brief.distribution_lens: Prefer domains that ambitious online people would use, share, debate, or brag about on X.
candidate_requirements: Return 1-3 candidate domain chips only
Every candidate must describe a repeated specialization loop
Every candidate must describe a repeated mastery loop
Prefer domains with talkability, social spread, or obvious creator / builder pull
Reject personas, generic features, and vague workflow ideas

raw_candidates.label: City Weekend Stack Loop
raw_candidates.description: A local planning loop for assembling repeatable weekend combinations of food, events, and social spots.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated city weekend stack loop workflow inside the local discovery / experiences wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make City Weekend Stack Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next city weekend stack loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: People keep asking the same question every weekend: what is the best stack of things to do without wasting time deciding.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: People keep asking the same question every weekend: what is the best stack of things to do without wasting time deciding.

raw_candidates.label: Restaurant Veto Resolution Loop
raw_candidates.description: A utility for resolving group restaurant indecision through repeated preference and veto patterns.
raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated restaurant veto resolution loop workflow inside the local discovery / experiences wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Restaurant Veto Resolution Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
raw_candidates.user_value_loop: review the next live signal, draft the next restaurant veto resolution loop move, execute it, measure the response, and update the working playbook for the next cycle
raw_candidates.evidence_summary: Group dining decisions are a recurring friction point that feels small but happens constantly.
raw_candidates.raw_observation: Group dining decisions are a recurring friction point that feels small but happens constantly.

raw_candidates.label: Live Event Discovery Loop

raw_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated live event discovery loop workflow inside the local discovery / experiences wedge
raw_candidates.mastery_surface: learning which inputs, timing, and execution patterns make Live Event Discovery Loop outperform generic or manual approaches for this audience over repeated cycles
